programme.title: Rim of the Canyon
programme.desc: ene Autrys stolen horse turns up in a ghost town where Gene goes after he is left stranded during a stagecoach race

programme.title: Lights of Old Sante Fe
programme.desc: In this musical western Marjorie Brooks Dale Evans is the owner and operator of a rodeo thats an antiquated touring company on its last legs Her business rival Frank Madden Richard Powers offers to combine their operations if the lovely Marjorie will be his bride Though she initially rebuffs his proposal a canceled booking tips the scales and forces Marjorie to accept But rodeo rider Roy Rogers Roy Rogers suspects Frank is behind Marjories troubles and sets out to investigate

programme.title: The Mystery of the Hooded Horsemen
programme.desc: In a small frontier mining town a gang of outlaws in black hoods is running roughshod over locals presiding over a reign of terror Tex Tex Ritter and Stubby Horace Murphy take up the dying wish of Tom Lafe McKee a kindly rancher killed by the gang to capture the marauders Knowing that the survival of the local mine and the heart of Toms sweet daughter Iris Meredith are on the line Tex and Stubby go undercover in the gang hoping to bring them down from the inside

programme.title: Trail Street
programme.desc: Bat Mastersons old friend Billy Burns convinces him to become marshal of Liberal Kansas and help the residents fight drought and a destructive range war

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: DefaultFiller
programme.desc: DefaultFiller

programme.title: DefaultFiller
programme.desc: DefaultFiller

programme.title: The Money Pit
programme.desc: A young couple struggles to repair a hopelessly dilapidated house

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: To warn some of the countrys wealthiest men about recurrent murders Agents West and Gordon visit Curtis Dodd who could become the next victim Dodd who is playing the piano is killed as a lethal spear is fired from the piano keys Through a series of clues West and Gordon realize that murdered men were all married to younger women whose marriages were arranged by matchmaker Emma Valentine

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Friday and Gannon investigate a series of burglaries that are taking place during the day and the victims are those with a recent wedding or death in the family A senior citizen uses the paper to find homes that are empty during the day

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: An ex-con who places an ad in a newspaper gets a reply referring to making a killing for 1000 He turns the reply over to Friday and Gannon who investigate the possibility that the replier is soliciting murder

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: A hated construction company owner with a heart condition recognizes Kimble and forces him to be his office assistant because of his doctor skills

programme.title: Sea Hunt
programme.desc: A beautiful millionairess who was crippled by a mountain climbing accident has her husband and doctor recommend scuba diving as therapy for her legs Nelson is hired to work with her The husband has an ulterior motive and it involves the strong currents at 60 feet below Drakes Head on the Pacific Coast

programme.title: Sea Hunt
programme.desc: Mike conducts a desperate search for survivors soon after a freighter sinks to the bottom of a river in the city of New York He finds two trapped men and a dog named Tiger surviving in an air pocket He must quickly find a way to save the men - and Tiger too

programme.title: 12 OClock High
programme.desc: Gen Savage decides to court martial a captain who broke formation to provide air cover for a crew bailing out of a plane creating much anger

programme.title: Dark Shadows
programme.desc: Barnabas is angered when Julia jealously snaps at Victoria

programme.title: Dark Shadows
programme.desc: Barnabas feels so well from the treatments that he decides to ask Victoria to sit and watch the sunrise with him so Julia hypnotizes her and shows Vicki where Barnabas slumbers

programme.title: Dark Shadows
programme.desc: When Barnabas begins aging Julia tries to reverse the process Meanwhile David offers Carolyn the toy soldier for protection which lands her a visit from Sarah

programme.title: Dark Shadows
programme.desc: Julias treatments backfire and Barnabas shows his true age so she suggests he replenish his blood with Victorias Meanwhile Carolyn begins to have doubts that David was making up stories about Barnabas

programme.title: Deadwood 76
programme.desc: A young drifter is mistaken for Billy the Kid The consequences prove deadly

programme.title: Jaws of Satan
programme.desc: A preacher whose ancestors were cursed by Druids battles Satan who has taken the form of a huge snake

programme.title: Fredy 112
programme.desc: Fredy 112

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: After the death penalty is abolished an executioner continues his former job through freelancing

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: A greedy woman makes the mistake of murdering her husband while an escaped mental patient dressed in a Santa Claus outfit is on the loose

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: A sculptor uses a drifter and his own abused girlfriend to recreate a murdersuicide

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: Smarmy and opportunistic reality TV show host Jerry Rulac does an expose on the wild punk nightclub scene for the latest segment of his television program Why Are You Here Jerry uncovers more than he bargained for when he decides to focus on troubled wealthy party girl Donette and her unpredictable gaggle of scary friends

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric confronts the werewolf Nicholas Remy and discovers that he is more formidable an opponent than Skorzeny ever was

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric comes to the aid of a blind woman with a talent for trick shooting he meets while working at a carnival when he learns that her fiancé plans on killing her for the insurance money

programme.title: Forever Knight
programme.desc: A succession of murders lead Nick and Schanke to suspect the villain is hunting the citys most dangerous criminals for sport

programme.title: Friday 13th the Series
programme.desc: Ryan and Micki search for a cursed mulcher which is the murder weapon of choice for a gardeners assistant

programme.title: McHales Navy
programme.desc: McHale and The Boys have planned some entertainment for the Base Personnel but Binghamton puts a stop to it and orders McHale and his Crew to ferry him to a Staff Meeting so that he can keep an eye on them But after the 73 is put out of commission by a Japanese plane Binghamton if forced to do some entertaining of his own during a mission to obtain some fuel on a Japanese-held island

programme.title: McHales Navy
programme.desc: While trying to impress a pretty Nurse Parker receives several serious blows to his morale and humiliated he puts in for a transfer Then complications arise when McHale The Crew and the Nurse work up a plan to try to help him to regain his self-esteem and change his mind

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Gomer makes friends with a hillbilly named Branch

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Troy is captured while trying to make contact with the underground in a small village At stake is micro-film information about a new type of bomb the Germans have developed

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: The hungry castaways find a wild duck on the island but they dont know whether to use it as food or attach a message to him and hope for rescue

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: Gilligans Christmas wish appears to be coming true when a radio broadcast tells them their rescue is imminent While they wait they recall the first days on the island when Gilligan lost the radio and transmitter

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: Grampa begins neglecting Flora MacMichael when an attractive 50-year-old widow develops an interest in him

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: Luke volunteers to coach Little Lukes baseball team but soon finds himself beset by constant interference and advice from the other boys fathers

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: Max must retrieve something from a member of the Russian womens swim team but cant remember her name

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: KAOS uses Hymie as a robotic assassin against the Chief

programme.title: BJ and the Bear
programme.desc: BJ Callie and Stacks help BJs old friend Steven Thomas Ulysses Nathaniel Travis complete the filming of his television pilot Buster Crabbe is outstanding as an aging stuntman with a secret

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Mister Ed volunteers to be shot into outer space

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Through Rogers trickery Ed believes that he has a shameful heritage so he runs away from home

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: There seems to be a traitor in the escaped prisoner pipeline and Hogan has to find him by following the escape route

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: Carter receives a Dear John letter and wants to join the rest of the prisoners that escape and go home

programme.title: Mozambique 1964
programme.desc: An out-of-work and penniless American pilot is offered work in Mozambique and promptly becomes an unwitting pawn in a world of drug smuggling kidnap and murder

programme.title: Morning Departure
programme.desc: Trouble arises when 12 men realize that only eight of them can escape from the sinking submarine that has collided with a mine left over from the war

programme.title: What A Way To Go
programme.desc: A four-time widow discusses her four marriages in which all of her husbands became incredibly rich and died prematurely because of their drive to be rich

programme.title: Genghis Khan
programme.desc: During the thirteenth century the shy Mongol boy Temujin Carlo Cura becomes the fearless leader Genghis Khan Omar Sharif who unites all Mongol tribes and conquers most of Asia Europe and the Middle East

programme.title: The Strange and Deadly Occurance
programme.desc: Something or someone haunts a couples Robert Stack Vera Miles new home in the country

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: The Dukes of Hazzard
programme.desc: Hughie Hogg returns with his eye on the office of Hazzard County Sheriff He blackmails his Uncle Boss into supporting his campaign by threatening to take secretly taken photographs of his criminal activities to the FBI Coy and Vance decide to support incumbent Rosco while they collect enough evidence to derail Hughies campaign and run him out of town

programme.title: Hercules
programme.desc: Hercules

programme.title: Earth Final Conflict
programme.desc: A group of Resistance capture a volunteer from a Taelon program for youth Liam decides they may learn valuable information from her They also decide to send in one of their own as a volunteer to see what the program is teaching

programme.title: War of the Worlds
programme.desc: Suzanne learns that a friend of hers has disappeared from his college campus Meanwhile the aliens are on campus in search of a bio-weapon

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: Trapped in a cave with Alec and facing death by suffocation Arcane reviews his life in a grand soliloquy He can lie to others but ultimately can he lie to himself

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: 40 years ago a plane carrying valuable Egyptian antiquities and a mummy crashed in the swamp Arcane supports an expedition to find it but his interest is far more than financial

programme.title: Space 1999
programme.desc: The Alphans encounter a miles-long ark from the planet Daria where the inhabitants have a very distinctive class separation

programme.title: Big Valley
programme.desc: Heath arrives in a dying desert town only to find himself a visitor in a madhouse His hosts are five deranged people who play bizarre and deadly games with their infrequent guests Heaths role in their hellish fantasy the accused--on trial for rape and murder

programme.title: Cheyenne
programme.desc: His gear stolen Cheyenne follows the thief and killer to a small town The outlaw has stopped there to see the sheriff - his father The sheriff resigns so Cheyenne takes the job and falls for a girl whos father was the sheriff

programme.title: Young Riders
programme.desc: Young Riders

programme.title: Lonesome Dove Outlaw Years
programme.desc: Lonesome Dove Outlaw Years

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: Keller goes undercover as a draft dodger to investigate an AWOL Marines murder

programme.title: Mission Impossible
programme.desc: Cinnamon poses as the wife of an archaeologist with a serious heart condition He needs to be rescued and an assassination plot needs to be foiled

programme.title: Satans Triangle
programme.desc: A mysterious woman is the sole survivor of a boat wreck caused by a sudden terrible storm off the coast of Florida

programme.title: The Strange and Deadly Occurance
programme.desc: Something or someone haunts a couples Robert Stack Vera Miles new home in the country

programme.title: The Horror at 37000 Feet
programme.desc: An invisible demon in the cargo hold of a jet airliner terrorizes the passengers

programme.title: Night of the Zombies
programme.desc: Investigators search for soldiers missing bodies and hear unbelievable rumors about zombies Dismissing those rumors they set out to investigate After two men are found dead CIA special-agent Nick Monroe is sent to flush out what are suspected to be deserters from the old US Army Chemical Corps unit Nicks ruthless investigation uncovers a ghoulish plot of world domination but first he must escape the horror that does not want to be known yet!

programme.title: Invincible Super Chan
programme.desc: Invincible Super Chan

programme.title: The Incredible Hulk Returns
programme.desc: Hopefully on the verge of curing his Hulk condition Banner meets his colleague Don Blake who is mystically linked to a Viking warrior Thor

programme.title: Firewalker
programme.desc: Two seasoned adventurers recruited by a seemingly psychic woman with a treasure map go on an adventure to recover a horde of gold belonging to an ancient being called the Firewalker

programme.title: Bionic Ever After
programme.desc: Steve Austin and Jaime Summers are about to get married However before they can something is happening to Jaime It seems like her bionics are failing and no one knows whats wrong with her It seems that someone has been doing something to her who and why At the same time an old friend of Steves is being held prisoner by some terrorists and Steve needing to take his mind off Jaime offers to go and help

programme.title: American Flyers
programme.desc: Marcus takes his kid brother David with him for a physical test and a brain scan suspecting cerebral aneurysm like their dad died of They head off on bikes for the big Rockies bike race with Marcus Sarah driving the van

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: The Gladiator
programme.desc: A homicidal maniac is on the loose in Los Angeles killing motorists at random with his death car After losing his brother Jeff to the twisted assassin known as Skull Rick Benton takes it upon himself to hunt down the reckless drivers that fill the streets at night Being a master mechanic Rick spends his time converting his pick-up truck into an armed and dangerous vehicle With speed to take on the fastest car and strength to make sure in a one-on-one situation he will be the only survivor The cops soon find out about the vigilante known only as the Gladiator and do all they can to catch him before his citizens arrests go one step too far

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: Computer calculations give Zartan Omega as the probable location of Audric This planet is covered with blue light from the red dwarf sun and grows only giant flowers Upon reaching it though they discover Monster Minds have set up a satellite

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: An unconquered planet in the midst of Monster Minds intrigues the Lightning League and they go to investigate Upon crash landing they discover the energy of the Pride and the vehicles and their own energy is being drained

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: The pupils seek out and find Merlin and hell teach the pupil Presto magic if he stays with Merlin Presto decides to stay and attempts a spell to create a way home but the spell summons dragons instead which attack a nearby village

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: The group encounters Sir John a seemingly fearless knight But hes really a coward his village is ready to exile him unless he performs one brave deed Venger captures Sir Johns son and tells him to lead the group into a trap
